payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current employment fact: Sam no longer currently works at Goldman and now works at Point72. Preserve Goldman as a past employer.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, as the existing current fact; no evidence suggests a different Sam.

details: Classified as an employment transition conflict.
Accepted the new fact as current.
Converted the prior Goldman employment fact to past employment.

repair_options: Mark the existing fact 'Sam works at Goldman' as superseded or no longer current.
Add current employment: Sam works at Point72.
Optionally retain historical employment: Sam previously worked at Goldman.
